title: Spanish Chicken and Vegetables
description: A flavorful and quick chicken dish with a mix of Spanish spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes per side.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the bell pepper and zucchini to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the Spanish seasoning.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the chicken and vegetables hot.
